name: Without Your Help I Can't Become the King of the Pirates!!!!
effect_text: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 1 or less Life cards, play up to 1 of your yellow "Straw Hat Crew" type Character cards or [Sanji] with a cost of 5 or less from your hand.
